name: @metorial/docugenerate
description: Generate documents from reusable Word templates by merging them with dynamic JSON or spreadsheet data. Create and manage templates (DOCX, DOC, ODT, TXT), generate documents in multiple output formats (PDF, DOCX, DOC, ODT, TXT, HTML, PNG), and manage generated documents. Supports PDF attachments, PDF merging, template versioning, configurable tag delimiters, enhanced syntax for complex expressions, and multi-region processing for data compliance.
